name: General Tso's Chicken with Orange
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
This popular dish gets a lift from the addition of orange peel, hence its other name, Orange Peel Chicken.
Cut chicken into thin slices 2 inches long, cutting against the grain. Place it in a bowl with the soy sauce, rice wine or dry sherry, ginger, cornstarch and sesame oil. Mix well, then let the mixture marinate for about 20 minutes. Heat the oil in a wok or large skillet until very hot. Remove chicken from marinade using a slotted spoon. Add it to the pan and stir-fry for 2 minutes until browned. Remove chicken and drain in a colander or sieve. Pour off most of the oil, leaving about 2 teaspoons. Return the pan to high heat and add dried chiles. Stir-fry for 10 seconds. Return chicken to the pan and add remaining ingredients. Stir-fry for 4 minutes, mixing well. Serve immediately.
